annotations.text: BTCUSDT 1h shows a strong, steady bullish trend with higher highs and higher lows across the recent candles. Momentum remains intact, but price is near short-term extension, so a pullback entry is preferable over chasing. Plan: buy on a modest retracement into prior breakout/support zone around 84720. Invalidation is a clean loss of the recent structure below 84480. Targets are set at 85180 and 85550, with a stretch target at 86000 if momentum continues.

strategy.invalidationCondition: Cancel the long setup if BTCUSDT closes below 84480 on the 1h timeframe before entry, or exit if price breaks and holds below that level after entry.

annotations.text: BTCUSDT 1h is in a strong short-term uptrend with consistent higher closes and no clear reversal signal in the provided candles. Momentum remains bullish, but price is extended after a steady grind higher, so the better plan is to buy on a mild pullback rather than chase the current candle. A balanced setup is a limit long near the recent breakout/support zone, with risk defined below the latest higher-low structure.

strategy.invalidationCondition: Invalidate the long setup if 1h price closes below 84280 or if momentum breaks structure with consecutive lower highs/lows before entry.
